articles.title: NH cold case solved 40 years after police found man’s skull in woods
articles.description:
Investigators partnered with a nonprofit genetic genealogy analysis organization to identify the man who the remains belonged to.

The post NH cold case solved 40 years after police found man’s skull in woods appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Investigators identified a man whose skull was found in New Hampshire 40 years ago.
The identification was made possible through a partnership with a genetic genealogy organization.
This resolution may bring closure to families in the Boston area affected by similar cold cases.

articles.title: Boston police issue scam warning for fake parking violations
articles.description:
The fraudulent documents are disguised as official notices, containing judge and court information and a Massachusetts state seal.

The post Boston police issue scam warning for fake parking violations appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Boston police warn residents about fake parking violation scams targeting locals.
Fraudulent documents mimic official notices with Massachusetts state seal and court details.
Residents should verify parking violations directly with the Boston police to avoid scams.

articles.title: Mansfield man charged with illegally possessing ammunition, prosecutors say
articles.description:
Investigators say the convicted bank robber was on supervised release when agents found ammunition, firearm parts, and a loaded pistol in his Mansfield home.

The post Mansfield man charged with illegally possessing ammunition, prosecutors say appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Mansfield man charged with illegal ammunition possession during supervised release.
Convicted bank robber found with a loaded pistol and firearm parts at home.
Potential safety concerns arise for Boston residents due to increased gun violence.
